docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT ELLIOTT, THERICA
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-19-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-19-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,515.00 FILED BY CORNELL, PATRICIA AS TO DEFENDANT ELLIOTT, THERICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-10-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-22-2009 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO MAR-19-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PROGRESS REPORT HEARING TO BE SET IN JULY 2010, NOVEMBER 2010 AND MARCH 2011. IF NO APPEARANCE AT MARCH 2011 HEARING THEN THE CASE IS TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PROGRESS REPORT ARE FOR COMPLIANCE WITH A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT, PER JUDGE PRO TEM BRADLEY KAPLAN. COPY SENT TO PARTIES.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-19-2010 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED UNDELIVERED. SENT TO DEFENDANT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CORNELL, PATRICIA AS TO DEFENDANT ELLIOTT, THERICA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-20-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ELLIOTT, THERICA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-10-2009 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-22-2009 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORNELL, PATRICIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELLIOTT, THERICA $1,515.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,575.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING IS GRANTED. -JUDGE PRO TEM:TODD WENZEL-
